appliedUpdates.description: Documented that the full `bun run test` validator now completes successfully but takes about 165 seconds because `apps/browser-executor/src/browserLeaseDO.test.ts` dominates runtime, so future validators should use a >=4 minute timeout.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the scrutiny-validator procedure to explicitly fall back to manual review or a known-good built-in model when Task subagents fail to start because the inherited custom model identifier is invalid.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: During this scrutiny run, both `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` and fallback `worker` Task invocations failed before producing output because the inherited model string `custom:GPT-5.4-(xHigh)-16` was rejected as invalid, so the validator had to produce the review JSON files manually after completing the code review itself.
